name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Indianapolis Superb Cash Advance on West 38th Street offers fast personal loans with flexible terms and same-day funding options for IN residents.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance is located at 39 W 38th St space 55 in Indianapolis, IN, offering a convenient standalone location for personal loans. This Indianapolis branch is open Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, with weekend hours from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM on Saturdays and Sundays. The location serves residents throughout Indianapolis and the surrounding area who need quick access to personal loan services.

At this Indianapolis location, you can apply for personal loans with competitive terms and fast approval decisions. The branch team can answer questions about loan amounts, repayment schedules, and next steps in the application process. For specific details about rates or to start your application, call 317-526-5390 to speak with a loan officer.

Indianapolis residents visiting this West 38th St location should bring a valid ID, proof of employment or income, and a recent bank statement. Walk-in applications are welcome during business hours, and the staff can often provide decisions and funding within the same business day. Superb Cash Advance focuses on providing accessible personal loans for borrowers with varying credit profiles.
pros: Extended branch hours (Mon-Fri until 8:30pm, weekends until 6:30pm) for after-work access
Same-day cash approval and funding reported consistently by reviewers
All credit types accepted across every listed product
Minimal documentation required for same-day loan products
Loan amounts span a wide range — $250 up to $50,000 for bad credit loans
Physical storefront allows face-to-face service and in-person questions
Flexible repayment scheduling reportedly offered to match borrower budgets
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed anywhere on the location page
Customer reviews for this Atlanta location include testimonials explicitly referencing a different branch (Arvada, CO) — review authenticity for this specific location is unclear
Payday and cash advance products capped at $1,000, limiting usefulness for larger emergencies
No online application or account management portal evident from the location page
High-cost short-term lending category carries significant rollover and debt-cycle risk
best_for: Borrowers with poor or no credit who have been declined elsewhere
Individuals needing $500 or less in same-day cash for a specific emergency
People who prefer in-person service and cannot navigate online-only lenders
Borrowers who need flexible repayment scheduling on a small installment loan
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best suited for borrowers with damaged credit who need $1,000 or less quickly and have exhausted lower-cost options like credit union PALs or employer advances. The main caveat is a complete absence of disclosed rates and fees on the site — always ask for the full APR in writing before accepting any offer, as payday and cash advance products in Georgia can carry triple-digit annual rates.
services: Second-lien title loans (referenced in customer reviews)
In-person branch service with extended weekday and weekend hours
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 39 W 38th St, Indianapolis, IN. Fast personal loans with same-day funding and flexible terms.
